text: A contract may provide for partial payments to the contractor.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 223. Bids & Contracts for Highway Projects
##### § 223.009 — Partial Payment

A contract may provide for partial payments to the contractor.

*Acts 2007, 80th Leg., R.S., Ch. 313 (H.B.2075), Sec. 1, eff. June 15, 2007.*

subsections.text: A contract may provide for partial payments to the contractor.
